summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mage character template implementation. All core features working correctly including character type selection, conditional rendering, section renaming, and Mage-specific content.
passed_tests: Character type badge shows 'MAGE' for mage characters and 'SIN-EATER' for geist characters
Create character dialog appears when clicking + button with both Mage and Sin-Eater options
Mage character correctly hides 'Geist & Remembrance' section
Sin-Eater character correctly shows 'Geist & Remembrance' section
Mage shows 'GNOSIS & RESOURCES' instead of 'Synergy & Resources'
Mage shows 'ARCANA, SPELLS & ATTAINMENTS' instead of 'Haunts Keys & Mementos'
Mage Gnosis section includes Gnosis track (1-10 dots with current value)
Mage Gnosis section includes Nimbus fillable text field
Mage Gnosis section includes Mana resource track with current/max values
Mage Arcana section displays all 10 Arcana (Death, Fate, Forces, Life, Matter, Mind, Prime, Space, Spirit, Time)
Mage Arcana section includes dot ratings (1-5) for each Arcanum
Mage Arcana section includes Rotes section with Add button
Mage Arcana section includes Praxes section
Mage Arcana section includes Attainments area (auto-calculated)
Character type selection dialog works correctly for both character types
Conditional rendering works properly between Mage and Sin-Eater character types
